ticket.title: QUOTED RATE DOES NOT MATCH RATE BREAKDOWN CALCULATION

test_cases.description: Verify the Rate Breakdown total matches the Generated Quotation rate for Bacolod Package 5, Budget tier, 4 pax.
test_cases.expected_result: Both values show the identical final rate (currently ₱2,399 vs ₱2,499 mismatch).

test_cases.description: Verify rate consistency across different pax counts (Solo through 13 pax) for the same package and tier.
test_cases.expected_result: Rate Breakdown and Generated Quotation match at every pax count.

test_cases.description: Verify rate consistency across different hotel tiers (Budget, 3-Star A, 3-Star B, 4-Star) for the same package.
test_cases.expected_result: Rate Breakdown and Generated Quotation match for every hotel tier.

test_cases.description: Verify rate consistency when 'Add airfare' and 'Your markup' fields are populated in Booking Details.
test_cases.expected_result: Airfare and markup are correctly folded into both the Rate Breakdown and the quoted total, with matching final numbers.

test_cases.description: Verify rate consistency between the Admin view and the Agent view for the same package/tier/pax selection.
test_cases.expected_result: Admin and Agent both display the same final rate for identical selections.
